info.name: SmartEduConnect API - Flutter Developer Guide
info.description: Complete API documentation with detailed field specifications for Flutter mobile app development

request.description:
**Purpose:** Check if admin user exists in the system

**Auth Required:** No

**Response Fields:**
- `exists` (boolean): true if admin exists, false otherwise

**Purpose:** Login with email and password

**Auth Required:** No

**Request Body Fields:**
- `email` (string, required): User email address
- `password` (string, required): User password

**Response Fields:**
- `token` (string): API authentication token (store this for subsequent requests)
- `user` (object): User details
  - `id` (integer): User ID
  - `name` (string): User full name
  - `email` (string): User email
  - `created_at` (string): Account creation timestamp
  - `updated_at` (string): Last update timestamp
  - `profile` (object): User profile details
    - `id` (integer): Profile ID
    - `user_id` (integer): Associated user ID
    - `full_name` (string): Full name
    - `email` (string): Email
    - `phone` (string|null): Phone number
    - `address` (string|null): Address
    - `photo_url` (string|null): Profile photo URL
  - `role` (object): User role
    - `id` (integer): Role ID
    - `user_id` (integer): Associated user ID
    - `role` (string): Role name (admin, teacher, parent)

**Error Response (422):**
- `message` (string): "Invalid credentials"

**Purpose:** Register new user (first user becomes admin automatically)

**Auth Required:** No

**Request Body Fields:**
- `full_name` (string, required, max:255): User's full name
- `email` (string, required, email, max:255): Unique email address
- `password` (string, required, min:8): Password
- `role` (string, optional): Role type - 'admin', 'teacher', or 'parent' (default: 'parent')

**Response Fields:** Same as Login response
- `token` (string): API authentication token
- `user` (object): User details with profile and role

**Note:** If no admin exists, the first registered user automatically becomes admin regardless of role parameter.

**Purpose:** Get currently authenticated user details

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response Fields:**
- `user` (object): Complete user object with profile and role (same structure as login response)

**Purpose:** Logout current user and invalidate token

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response Fields:**
- `message` (string): "Logged out"

**Purpose:** Get teacher's email by teacher ID (for password reset flows)

**Auth Required:** No

**Request Body Fields:**
- `teacher_id` (string, required): Teacher ID

**Response Fields:**
- `email` (string): Teacher's email address

**Error Response (404):**
- `message` (string): "Teacher not found" or "Teacher email not found"

**Purpose:** Get parent's email by student admission number or login ID

**Auth Required:** No

**Request Body Fields:**
- `student_identifier` (string, required): Student admission number or login ID

**Response Fields:**
- `email` (string): Parent's email address

**Error Response (404):**
- `message` (string): "Student not found", "Parent account not found", or "Parent email not found"

**Purpose:** Get dashboard statistics (role-specific data)

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response Fields:**
- `students` (integer): Total number of students
- `teachers` (integer): Total number of teachers
- `classes` (integer): Total number of classes
- `today_attendance_rate` (float): Today's attendance percentage (0-100)
- `pending_leave_requests` (integer): Count of pending leave requests
- `pending_certificate_requests` (integer): Count of pending certificate requests
- `open_complaints` (integer): Count of open complaints
- `latest_announcements` (array): Latest 4 announcements
  - Each announcement object:
    - `id` (integer): Announcement ID
    - `title` (string): Announcement title
    - `content` (string): Announcement content
    - `class_id` (integer|null): Target class ID (null for all)
    - `created_by` (integer): Creator user ID
    - `created_at` (string): Creation timestamp
    - `updated_at` (string): Update timestamp

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
{
  "students": 450,
  "teachers": 35,
  "classes": 12,
  "today_attendance_rate": 92.5,
  "pending_leave_requests": 5,
  "pending_certificate_requests": 3,
  "open_complaints": 2,
  "latest_announcements": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "title": "Sports Day Announcement",
      "content": "Annual sports day will be held on March 30th",
      "class_id": null,
      "created_by": 1,
      "created_at": "2026-03-20T10:00:00.000000Z",
      "updated_at": "2026-03-20T10:00:00.000000Z"
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
**Purpose:** Get list of all classes

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response:** Array of class objects

**Purpose:** Get classes with management data (admin only)

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Admin role

**Response:** Array of class objects with student counts and teacher info

**Purpose:** Create new class (admin only)

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Admin role

**Request Body Fields:**
- `name` (string, required): Class name
- `section` (string, required): Section name
- `class_teacher_id` (integer, optional): Class teacher ID
- `academic_year` (string, optional): Academic year

**Response:** Created class object

**Purpose:** Update class (admin only)

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Admin role

**URL Parameters:**
- `id` (integer, required): Class ID

**Request Body Fields:** Same as Create (all optional)

**Response:** Updated class object

**Purpose:** Delete class (admin only)

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Admin role

**URL Parameters:**
- `id` (integer, required): Class ID

**Response:** Success message

**Purpose:** Get list of all students

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Query Parameters:**
- `class_id` (integer, optional): Filter by class
- `status` (string, optional): Filter by status

**Response:** Array of student objects

**Purpose:** Get students directory with basic info

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response:** Array of student objects with minimal fields

**Purpose:** Get specific student details

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**URL Parameters:**
- `id` (integer, required): Student ID

**Response:** Single student object with all fields

**Purpose:** Get attendance summary for a specific student

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**URL Parameters:**
- `id` (integer, required): Student ID

**Response Fields:**
- `total_days` (integer): Total school days
- `present_days` (integer): Days present
- `absent_days` (integer): Days absent
- `late_days` (integer): Days late
- `attendance_percentage` (float): Attendance percentage

**Purpose:** Get exam marks for a specific student

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**URL Parameters:**
- `id` (integer, required): Student ID

**Response:** Array of exam mark objects

**Purpose:** Get attendance report for a class on a specific date

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Query Parameters:**
- `class_id` (integer, required): Class ID
- `date` (string, required): Date in YYYY-MM-DD format

**Response:** Array of attendance records
- `id` (integer): Attendance record ID
- `student_id` (integer): Student ID
- `student_name` (string): Student full name
- `date` (string): Attendance date
- `status` (string): Status - 'present', 'absent', 'late', 'excused'
- `remarks` (string|null): Remarks
- `marked_by` (integer): User ID who marked attendance
- `created_at` (string): Creation timestamp

**Purpose:** Mark attendance for students (teacher/admin only)

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Teacher or Admin role

**Request Body Fields:**
- `class_id` (integer, required): Class ID
- `date` (string, required): Date in YYYY-MM-DD format
- `attendance` (array, required): Array of attendance records
  - `student_id` (integer, required): Student ID
  - `status` (string, required): 'present', 'absent', 'late', or 'excused'
  - `remarks` (string, optional): Additional remarks

**Response:**
- `message` (string): Success message
- `marked_count` (integer): Number of records marked

**Purpose:** Get all exams data

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response:** Array of exam objects
- `id` (integer): Exam ID
- `name` (string): Exam name
- `exam_cycle_id` (integer): Exam cycle ID
- `class_id` (integer): Class ID
- `subject_id` (integer): Subject ID
- `exam_date` (string): Exam date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `start_time` (string): Start time (HH:MM:SS)
- `end_time` (string): End time (HH:MM:SS)
- `total_marks` (float): Total marks
- `passing_marks` (float): Passing marks
- `created_at` (string): Creation timestamp

**Purpose:** Get all exam cycles

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response:** Array of exam cycle objects
- `id` (integer): Cycle ID
- `name` (string): Cycle name (e.g., "Mid-Term 2026")
- `academic_year` (string): Academic year
- `start_date` (string): Start date
- `end_date` (string): End date
- `is_active` (boolean): Active status

**Purpose:** Get all notifications for current user

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Query Parameters:**
- `page` (integer, optional): Page number (default: 1)
- `per_page` (integer, optional): Items per page (default: 20)

**Response:** Paginated notification list
- `data` (array): Array of notification objects
  - `id` (string): Notification UUID
  - `type` (string): Notification type
  - `notifiable_type` (string): User model type
  - `notifiable_id` (integer): User ID
  - `data` (object): Notification data
    - `title` (string): Notification title
    - `body` (string): Notification body
    - `icon` (string|null): Icon URL
    - `url` (string|null): Action URL
  - `read_at` (string|null): Read timestamp (null if unread)
  - `created_at` (string): Creation timestamp
- `current_page` (integer): Current page
- `total` (integer): Total notifications
- `per_page` (integer): Items per page
- `last_page` (integer): Last page number

**Purpose:** Get count of unread notifications

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response Fields:**
- `unread_count` (integer): Number of unread notifications

**Purpose:** Mark notifications as read

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Request Body Fields:**
- `notification_ids` (array, required): Array of notification UUIDs

**Response Fields:**
- `message` (string): Success message
- `marked_count` (integer): Number of notifications marked as read

**Purpose:** Mark all notifications as read

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response Fields:**
- `message` (string): Success message

**Purpose:** Get VAPID public key for push notifications (Web Push)

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response Fields:**
- `public_key` (string): VAPID public key

**Note:** For Flutter, you may use FCM instead of Web Push

**Purpose:** Subscribe to push notifications

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Request Body Fields:**
- `endpoint` (string, required): Push notification endpoint URL
- `keys` (object, required): Encryption keys
  - `p256dh` (string, required): Public key
  - `auth` (string, required): Auth secret

**Response Fields:**
- `message` (string): Success message
- `subscription_id` (integer): Subscription ID

**Note:** For Flutter with FCM, you may need to adapt this endpoint or create a custom FCM token registration endpoint

**Purpose:** Get list of all conversations for current user

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response:** Array of conversation objects
- `user_id` (integer): Other user's ID
- `user_name` (string): Other user's name
- `user_photo` (string|null): Other user's photo URL
- `last_message` (string): Last message text
- `last_message_time` (string): Last message timestamp
- `unread_count` (integer): Unread messages count

query.description: User ID to get messages with (required)

request.description:
**Purpose:** Get messages with a specific user

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Query Parameters:**
- `with_user_id` (integer, required): User ID to get messages with
- `page` (integer, optional): Page number for pagination

**Response:** Paginated message list
- `data` (array): Array of message objects
  - `id` (integer): Message ID
  - `from_user_id` (integer): Sender user ID
  - `to_user_id` (integer): Recipient user ID
  - `message` (string): Message text
  - `is_read` (boolean): Read status
  - `created_at` (string): Sent timestamp
- `current_page` (integer): Current page
- `total` (integer): Total messages
- `per_page` (integer): Items per page

**Purpose:** Send a message to another user

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Request Body Fields:**
- `to_user_id` (integer, required): Recipient user ID
- `message` (string, required, max:1000): Message text

**Response:** Created message object
- `id` (integer): Message ID
- `from_user_id` (integer): Sender user ID
- `to_user_id` (integer): Recipient user ID
- `message` (string): Message text
- `is_read` (boolean): Read status (false)
- `created_at` (string): Sent timestamp

**Purpose:** Mark messages as read

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Request Body Fields:**
- `message_ids` (array, required): Array of message IDs

**Response Fields:**
- `message` (string): Success message
- `marked_count` (integer): Number of messages marked as read

**Purpose:** Get current user profile

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response Fields:**
- `id` (integer): Profile ID
- `user_id` (integer): User ID
- `full_name` (string): Full name
- `email` (string): Email
- `phone` (string|null): Phone number
- `address` (string|null): Address
- `photo_url` (string|null): Profile photo URL
- `date_of_birth` (string|null): Date of birth
- `gender` (string|null): Gender
- `created_at` (string): Creation timestamp
- `updated_at` (string): Update timestamp

**Purpose:** Update user profile

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Request Body Fields (all optional):**
- `full_name` (string, max:255): Full name
- `phone` (string, max:20): Phone number
- `address` (string, max:500): Address
- `date_of_birth` (string): Date of birth (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `gender` (string): Gender (male/female/other)

**Response:** Updated profile object

**Purpose:** Upload profile photo

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Request Body (multipart/form-data):**
- `photo` (file, required): Image file (jpg, jpeg, png, max 2MB)

**Response Fields:**
- `message` (string): Success message
- `photo_url` (string): URL of uploaded photo

**Purpose:** Change user password

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Request Body Fields:**
- `current_password` (string, required): Current password
- `new_password` (string, required, min:8): New password
- `new_password_confirmation` (string, required): New password confirmation

**Response Fields:**
- `message` (string): Success message

**Purpose:** Get list of parent's children

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Parent role

**Response:** Array of student objects (parent's children)

**Purpose:** Get fees data for parent's children

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Parent role

**Response:** Array of fee records
- `student_id` (integer): Student ID
- `student_name` (string): Student name
- `fee_type` (string): Fee type (tuition, transport, etc.)
- `amount` (float): Fee amount
- `due_date` (string): Due date
- `status` (string): Payment status (paid/pending/overdue)
- `paid_amount` (float): Amount paid
- `balance` (float): Balance amount

**Purpose:** Get timetable for parent's children

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Parent role

**Response:** Array of timetable entries
- `student_id` (integer): Student ID
- `student_name` (string): Student name
- `day` (string): Day of week (Monday-Friday)
- `period` (integer): Period number
- `subject_name` (string): Subject name
- `teacher_name` (string): Teacher name
- `start_time` (string): Start time (HH:MM)
- `end_time` (string): End time (HH:MM)
- `room` (string|null): Room number

**Purpose:** Get homework for parent's children

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Parent role

**Response:** Array of homework objects
- `id` (integer): Homework ID
- `student_id` (integer): Student ID
- `student_name` (string): Student name
- `subject_name` (string): Subject name
- `title` (string): Homework title
- `description` (string): Homework description
- `assigned_date` (string): Assigned date
- `due_date` (string): Due date
- `status` (string): Status (pending/submitted/graded)
- `submission_date` (string|null): Submission date
- `marks` (float|null): Marks obtained
- `feedback` (string|null): Teacher feedback

query.description: Student ID (optional, if not provided returns all children)
Month in YYYY-MM format (optional, defaults to current month)

request.description:
**Purpose:** Get attendance data for parent's children

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Parent role

**Query Parameters:**
- `student_id` (integer, optional): Specific student ID
- `month` (string, optional): Month in YYYY-MM format

**Response:** Array of attendance records

**Purpose:** Get classes assigned to teacher

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Teacher role

**Response:** Array of class objects assigned to teacher

**Purpose:** Get timetable for teacher

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Teacher role

**Response:** Array of timetable entries for teacher's classes

**Purpose:** Get students in a specific class

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Teacher role

**URL Parameters:**
- `class_id` (integer, required): Class ID

**Response:** Array of student objects in the class

**Purpose:** Get all announcements (filtered by user role and class)

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Query Parameters:**
- `page` (integer, optional): Page number

**Response:** Paginated announcement list
- `data` (array): Array of announcement objects
  - `id` (integer): Announcement ID
  - `title` (string): Title
  - `content` (string): Content
  - `class_id` (integer|null): Target class (null = all)
  - `created_by` (integer): Creator user ID
  - `created_at` (string): Creation timestamp

**Purpose:** Create new announcement (admin/teacher only)

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Admin or Teacher role

**Request Body Fields:**
- `title` (string, required, max:255): Announcement title
- `content` (string, required): Announcement content
- `class_id` (integer|null, optional): Target class ID (null for all classes)

**Response:** Created announcement object

**Purpose:** Get all gallery folders

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response:** Array of folder objects
- `id` (integer): Folder ID
- `name` (string): Folder name
- `description` (string|null): Folder description
- `cover_image_url` (string|null): Cover image URL
- `image_count` (integer): Number of images in folder
- `created_at` (string): Creation timestamp

**Purpose:** Get images in a specific folder

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**URL Parameters:**
- `id` (integer, required): Folder ID

**Query Parameters:**
- `page` (integer, optional): Page number

**Response:** Paginated image list
- `data` (array): Array of image objects
  - `id` (integer): Image ID
  - `folder_id` (integer): Folder ID
  - `image_url` (string): Image URL
  - `thumbnail_url` (string): Thumbnail URL
  - `caption` (string|null): Image caption
  - `uploaded_at` (string): Upload timestamp

item.name: 14. Holidays
item.description: Holiday calendar management with recurring holidays support

query.description: Year in YYYY format (optional, defaults to current year)

request.description:
**Purpose:** Get all holidays for a specific year (includes recurring holidays)

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Query Parameters:**
- `year` (string, optional, format: YYYY): Year to fetch holidays for (defaults to current year)

**Response:** Array of holiday objects
- `id` (integer|string): Holiday ID (recurring holidays have format 'recurring_{id}_{year}')
- `name` (string): Holiday name
- `start_date` (string): Start date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `end_date` (string|null): End date (YYYY-MM-DD) - null for single-day holidays
- `type` (string): Holiday type - 'national', 'religious', 'school', or 'optional'
- `description` (string|null): Holiday description
- `image_url` (string|null): Holiday image URL
- `is_recurring` (boolean): Whether holiday recurs annually
- `created_by` (integer): Creator user ID
- `created_at` (string): Creation timestamp
- `updated_at` (string): Update timestamp

**Note:** Recurring holidays are automatically projected to the requested year

response.name: Success Response
response.body:

]

formdata.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format (optional, for multi-day holidays)
Holiday type: national, religious, school, or optional (required)
Whether holiday recurs annually: true or false (optional, default: false)
Holiday image (optional, max 10MB, formats: jpg, jpeg, png, gif)

request.description:
**Purpose:** Create new holiday (admin only)

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Admin role

**Request Body (multipart/form-data):**
- `name` (string, required, max:255): Holiday name
- `start_date` (string, required, format: YYYY-MM-DD): Start date
- `end_date` (string, optional, format: YYYY-MM-DD): End date (must be >= start_date)
- `type` (string, required): Holiday type - 'national', 'religious', 'school', or 'optional'
- `description` (string, optional): Holiday description
- `is_recurring` (boolean, optional): Whether holiday recurs annually (default: false)
- `image` (file, optional): Holiday image (max 10MB, formats: jpg, jpeg, png, gif)

**Response:** Created holiday object (same structure as GET response)

**Error Response (403):**
- `message` (string): "Forbidden" (non-admin users)

**Error Response (422):**
- `message` (string): Validation error or "Image upload failed. Check storage permissions."

**Purpose:** Update existing holiday (admin only)

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Admin role

**URL Parameters:**
- `id` (integer, required): Holiday ID

**Request Body (multipart/form-data):** Same fields as Create Holiday
- All fields are required (provide existing values if not changing)
- If new image is uploaded, old image is automatically deleted

**Response:** Updated holiday object

**Error Response (403):**
- `message` (string): "Forbidden"

**Error Response (404):**
- `message` (string): "Not Found"

**Note:** Use POST with _method=PUT for multipart/form-data if your HTTP client doesn't support PUT with files

**Purpose:** Delete holiday (admin only)

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Admin role

**URL Parameters:**
- `id` (integer, required): Holiday ID

**Response:**
- `message` (string): "Deleted"

**Error Response (403):**
- `message` (string): "Forbidden"

**Error Response (404):**
- `message` (string): "Not Found"

**Note:** Associated image is automatically deleted from storage

**Purpose:** Get leave requests (role-based filtering)

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Query Parameters:**
- `status` (string, optional): Filter by status (pending/approved/rejected)

**Response:** Array of leave request objects
- `id` (integer): Leave request ID
- `student_id` (integer): Student ID
- `student_name` (string): Student name
- `from_date` (string): Start date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `to_date` (string): End date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `reason` (string): Leave reason
- `status` (string): Status (pending/approved/rejected)
- `approved_by` (integer|null): Approver user ID
- `remarks` (string|null): Admin/teacher remarks
- `created_at` (string): Request timestamp

**Purpose:** Create new leave request (parent only)

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Parent role

**Request Body Fields:**
- `student_id` (integer, required): Student ID (must be parent's child)
- `from_date` (string, required): Start date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `to_date` (string, required): End date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `reason` (string, required, max:500): Leave reason

**Response:** Created leave request object

**Purpose:** Update leave request status (admin/teacher only)

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token) - Admin or Teacher role

**URL Parameters:**
- `id` (integer, required): Leave request ID

**Request Body Fields:**
- `status` (string, required): Status (approved/rejected)
- `remarks` (string, optional, max:500): Admin/teacher remarks

**Response:** Updated leave request object

**Purpose:** Get complaints (role-based filtering)

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Query Parameters:**
- `status` (string, optional): Filter by status

**Response:** Array of complaint objects
- `id` (integer): Complaint ID
- `title` (string): Complaint title
- `description` (string): Complaint description
- `category` (string): Category (academic/infrastructure/staff/other)
- `status` (string): Status (open/in_progress/resolved/closed)
- `priority` (string): Priority (low/medium/high)
- `submitted_by` (integer): Submitter user ID
- `assigned_to` (integer|null): Assigned user ID
- `resolution` (string|null): Resolution details
- `created_at` (string): Submission timestamp
- `updated_at` (string): Last update timestamp

**Purpose:** Create new complaint

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Request Body Fields:**
- `title` (string, required, max:255): Complaint title
- `description` (string, required): Detailed description
- `category` (string, required): Category (academic/infrastructure/staff/other)
- `priority` (string, optional): Priority (low/medium/high, default: medium)

**Response:** Created complaint object

**Purpose:** Get all subjects

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response:** Array of subject objects
- `id` (integer): Subject ID
- `name` (string): Subject name
- `code` (string): Subject code
- `category` (string): Category (core/elective/language)
